case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. JOSE MANUEL ESPINOSA AGUAYO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AS REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA AGUAYO, JOSE MANUEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
